Learn to surf where the pros compete

Small-group and private lessons with Pedro across Peniche’s best beaches — Supertubos, Baleal and beyond. He reads the swell and wind each day and picks the spot that fits your level best. Boards and wetsuits included.

Prices

Trainings, rentals & packs

Prices are per person and may vary with the season. Every surf lesson includes insurance, wetsuit, surfboard and transport to the best spot — VAT included. Travelling as a group? Message us for a tailored pack.

Rentals

Equipment½ day1 day3 days5 days
Surfboard & wetsuit€25€28€82€135
Surfboard€18€23€65€100
Wetsuit€8€10€28€45

Good to know: ID or driver’s licence required · pick-up & return 9 AM–7 PM · payment in cash before use · gear returned in the same condition · a €200 deposit applies if you keep the gear with you (refunded on the last day) · VAT included.

Damage / total loss: surfboard €30 / €350 · wetsuit €25 / €150. Rental use is the client’s responsibility; insurance does not cover damage, loss or theft.

Ready to surf? Just send a quick email

There’s no online booking system — simply email the lessons or gear you’d like, with your dates and level, and Pedro gets back to you within a short time.

Enquire by email or call / WhatsApp +351 914 790 478
Your instructor

Meet Pedro — your coach and host

Pedro started surfing at just 13 and has spent his life in the water at Peniche — turning that lifelong passion into patient, personal coaching. He founded Peniche On Surf back in 2014 and reads each surfer individually, which is why guests so often feel real improvement after just a couple of hours.

He also runs the Supertubos West Surf bed & breakfast just a short hop away — so you can train and stay with the same welcoming team, treated like family from the moment you arrive. And he is never far from Bala, his dog, who is always by his side and the good soul of the school.

Qualifications
  • Portuguese Surf Federation (FPS) — Level 1 & 2 certificate
  • International Surfing Association (ISA) — Level 1 & 2 certificate
  • Surf & Rescue certified
— Pedro
Reviews

What surfers say

★★★★★ Rated 5.0 on Google — guests especially love Pedro's lessons
★★★★★

“Pedro is the best surf teacher in Baleal and Peniche. I started as a super beginner and have brought many friends over the years who all improved with him. He's kind, always positive, and a lovely person to hang out with for a beer. I truly recommend his school!”

Goffredo Colini Google review
★★★★★

“Pedro is an excellent teacher and his lessons are worth every penny. Great attitude, great equipment and very reasonable prices — everything you need for a great day of surfing is included. My group was only two people, so there was plenty of individual attention. Highly recommend!”

Sean Pierson Google review
★★★★★

“Did 5 lessons with Pedro — an absolute rockstar instructor and I improved so much! Pedro takes learning very seriously, which was great and so encouraging. Also check out their cozy B&B (Supertubos West Surf) to complete your experience in Peniche. So lucky I found this one!”

Jezlyn Wee Google review
★★★★★

“Honestly the best experience with this surf school! The owner Pedro was so kind and helpful throughout our stay and the surf sessions — and he has the loveliest dog. I learned a lot and caught some good waves. Will definitely come back next time in Ferrel!”

Marlene Gau Google review
